title: Touchstone Partners makes six Counsel
description: Touchstone Partners has announced the elevation of six Senior Associates to the position of Counsel.The following six lawyers have been made Counsel:Palak Chadha, New DelhiPranjal Doshi, MumbaiKunal Gopal, MumbaiSumnima Kataruka, BengaluruAnandini Kumari Rathore, New DelhiVaishnavi Sankar, BengaluruThe Firm shared in a press release:"Each of them brings a wealth of experience and a strong record of accomplishment in their respective practice areas, along with exceptional skill, dedication, colla
